name: pm-creator
description: Content creator skills: Content Repurposer, Hook Writer, Short-Form Script, Newsletter Writer, Creator Brand Kit, Creator Media Kit. Atomize one piece into a multi-platform pack (thread, LinkedIn, newsletter, carousel, Reel), write scroll-stopping hooks, script TikToks/Reels/Shorts, draft newsletter issues, define your niche/voice/pillars, and land sponsorships. The craft layer of the creator stack — pairs with the ContentGoldMine app for one-click automation.
